steps.title: Use the unique-benefits clue
steps.content: The passage says hDNA offers unique benefits, including the ability to determine the biogeographical origins of organisms. That supports a claim about special insights hDNA can provide, even though it is often degraded and underused.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported limits
steps.content: Choice A invents a comparison with other DNA of the same age. Choice B says hDNA is controversial, but the passage says it is underused because it is degraded. Choice C limits its value mainly to mammal research, which is not stated. The remaining choice captures the idea of unique genomic insights. The answer is D.
